patterns.name: Null Assignment
patterns.template: Use optional type: `{type} | null` or `{type} | undefined`

patterns.name: Missing Object Property
patterns.detect: Property '\w+' does not exist on type
patterns.template: Extend interface or use type assertion

patterns.name: Module Not Found
patterns.template: Install missing dependency: `pnpm add {module}` or `pnpm add -D @types/{module}`
